main_headline: Unable to retrieve live NBA playoff results for the night of May 1, 2026. Real-time game data was not accessible due to search and Reddit fetch unavailability.
sub_headline: Digest could not be populated with verified scores, stats, or series standings from last night's games.

recaps.title: Data Unavailable
recaps.body: Automated searches for NBA playoff scores, results, and highlights dated 2026-05-02 returned no verified data. Reddit's r/nba discussion thread was also inaccessible. This digest cannot responsibly fabricate game results, scores, player statistics, or series standings. Please check NBA.com, ESPN, or the NBA app for accurate last-night results.

headlines.body: Search tools did not return usable results for May 1, 2026 NBA playoff games. All fields requiring real game data have been left empty to prevent misinformation.
Visit NBA.com/playoffs, ESPN.com, or The Athletic for verified box scores, series standings, and player performance recaps from last night's action.
